name: Isla
dev_strap: Terraced hillside residences above the Ionian
sub: A third-floor one-bedroom residence in the stone village heart of Green Coast, Palasë.
description: A third-floor one-bedroom residence in the stone village heart of Green Coast, Palasë. Set above the central plaza where the Riviera hillside meets the sea air, the apartment pairs a calm, well-proportioned interior with the resort's promenades, pools and the Blue Flag beach below — a complete coastal address in Albania's most established seaside resort.
highlights: South-eastern edge, the last building before the greenery
Set apart on the quiet village boundary
Pools & Blue Flag beach below the resort
location_body: Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.
position_copy: Isla holds the south-eastern edge of the village — the last building before the greenery, set apart from the centre with the quiet of the boundary. The central plaza is a short walk north-west, the parking entrance beyond it, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.
